title: 2023 DPA years of design experience vs total working experience
summary: Median years of design-specific experience compared against median total working experience among survey respondents (N=323). Median design experience: 6 years. Median total working experience: 10 years, indicating a substantial share of designers transitioned into the field from other careers.
methodology: Self-reported years of design-specific experience and total years of working experience (all fields), compared as medians across all respondents.
